infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AeroFleet uses your camera to record driving video for safety monitoring.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: AeroFleet records audio alongside video for dashcam functionality.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AeroFleet uses your location to track vehicle position and route.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: AeroFleet tracks location in the background during active recording sessions.
